author: Aditya Jaiswal
text: Subject: iPad Version Performance & UI Issues I would like to share my feedback regarding the iPad version of the Groww app. While the platform is efficient and user-friendly on mobile devices, the experience on iPad currently requires improvement. The app interface does not appear to be fully optimized for iPad dimensions. The layout feels stretched and misaligned, which affects usability and overall visual appeal. A dedicated iPad-responsive design would significantly enhance the experience
